visa_types.name: Conventional Visa - Single Entry - Business Visit
visa_types.processing_time:
[Conventional Visa - Single Entry - Business Visit]

[Conventional Visa - Single Entry - Business Visit]
Kindly be advised that the following nationals cannot avail of expedite service:

Algeria, Egypt, Iraq, Jordan, Lebanon, Libya, Pakistan, Palestine, Sudan, Syria, Yemen, Somalia, Nigeria, Sri Lanka, India, Timor Leste (subject to change), Azerbaijan, Bangladesh and Iran.
visa_types.forms:
According to the Personal Information Protection Law, VFS Global must obtain your consent to process your personal data before proceeding with your visa application. Please download, print, complete, sign and bring the consent form along with your visa application form when you visit the Visa Application Centre.
Please click here to download the consent form.
Please select below Visa Application Forms to download as per jurisdiction,
- Embassy of the Republic of the Philippines in Beijing - Hebei, Shanxi, Liaoning, Jilin, Heilongjiang, Shandong, Henan, Gansu, Qinghai, Beijing, Tianjin, Inner Mongolia, Ningxia, Xinjiang, and Xizang
- Consulate General of the Republic of the Philippines in Shanghai - DISTRICT：Shanghai, Jiangsu, Zhejiang, Anhui, Hubei
- Consulate General of the Republic of the Philippines in Guangzhou - DISTRICT：Guangdong, Hunan, Guangxi, Hainan
- Consulate General of the Republic of the Philippines in Chongqing - DISTRICT：Chongqing, Guizhou, Yunnan, Shaanxi, Sichuan
- Consulate General of the Republic of the Philippines in Xiamen - DISTRICT：Fujian, Jiangxi
- Consulate General of the Republic of the Philippines in Hongkong
- Consulate General of the Republic of the Philippines in Macau
If permitted you may be able to send a representative to submit your application; they will need to present a letter of authorization signed by you, bring their Government identification at the submission.
Please fill out Additional Security questions Form and submit it along with your application.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Physical visa for Chinese nationals and other eligible applicants for business purposes.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Physical visa for Chinese nationals and other eligible applicants for business purposes.

## Visa Fees

[Conventional Visa - Single Entry - Business Visit]

## Documents Required
Business Checklist
Tourism Checklist

## Photo Specifications
PHOTOGRAPH SPECIFICATIONS FOR VISAS
- a passport-size photograph taken during the last six (6) months
- Photograph size is 35x45 mm

## Processing Time

[Conventional Visa - Single Entry - Business Visit]

[Conventional Visa - Single Entry - Business Visit]
Kindly be advised that the following nationals cannot avail of expedite service:

Algeria, Egypt, Iraq, Jordan, Lebanon, Libya, Pakistan, Palestine, Sudan, Syria, Yemen, Somalia, Nigeria, Sri Lanka, India, Timor Leste (subject to change), Azerbaijan, Bangladesh and Iran. 

## Download Forms

According to the Personal Information Protection Law, VFS Global must obtain your consent to process your personal data before proceeding with your visa application. Please download, print, complete, sign and bring the consent form along with your visa application form when you visit the Visa Application Centre.
Please click here to download the consent form.
Please select below Visa Application Forms to download as per jurisdiction,
- Embassy of the Republic of the Philippines in Beijing - Hebei, Shanxi, Liaoning, Jilin, Heilongjiang, Shandong, Henan, Gansu, Qinghai, Beijing, Tianjin, Inner Mongolia, Ningxia, Xinjiang, and Xizang
- Consulate General of the Republic of the Philippines in Shanghai - DISTRICT：Shanghai, Jiangsu, Zhejiang, Anhui, Hubei
- Consulate General of the Republic of the Philippines in Guangzhou - DISTRICT：Guangdong, Hunan, Guangxi, Hainan
- Consulate General of the Republic of the Philippines in Chongqing - DISTRICT：Chongqing, Guizhou, Yunnan, Shaanxi, Sichuan
- Consulate General of the Republic of the Philippines in Xiamen - DISTRICT：Fujian, Jiangxi
- Consulate General of the Republic of the Philippines in Hongkong
- Consulate General of the Republic of the Philippines in Macau
If permitted you may be able to send a representative to submit your application; they will need to present a letter of authorization signed by you, bring their Government identification at the submission.
Please fill out Additional Security questions Form and submit it along with your application.
